Match.title: Match
Match.description: Represents a single soccer match and its associated data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Match entity.

startTime.description: Date and time when the match started.

endTime.description: Date and time when the match ended.

currentPeriod.description: The current period of the match (e.g., 'P1', 'HALF_TIME', 'P2', 'FULL_TIME').

elapsedTime.description: The elapsed time of the current period in seconds.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents an event that occurred during a match (e.g., goal, foul, card).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

eventType.description: Type of the event (e.g., 'goal', 'foul', 'yellow card', 'red card', 'note').

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the event occurred (seconds since match start).

team.description: The team associated with the event (e.g., 'home', 'away').

playerJersey.description: Jersey number of the player involved in the event.

description.description: A textual description of the event.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores public information about a user.

approved.description: Whether the user has been approved by an admin.

/admins/{userId}.description: A collection to designate users as administrators. The existence of a document grants admin rights.
